mapper.sql: tc.name, tc.dependent_project, tc.dependent_id, tc.employee_type, tc.in_work_card, tc.in_name, tc.in_employee_id, tc.out_name, tc.out_organization, tc.use_object, tc.jurisdiction_setting, tc.file_id, tc.download_flag, tc.enabled_flag, tc.id, tc.create_time, tc.create_by, tc.update_time, tc.update_by, tc.approval_status,tc.oa_order,tc.last_verdict,tc.approval_end_time

${tAlias}.name as ${tAlias}_name, ${tAlias}.dependent_project as ${tAlias}_dependent_project, ${tAlias}.dependent_id as ${tAlias}_dependent_id, ${tAlias}.employee_type as ${tAlias}_employee_type, ${tAlias}.in_work_card as ${tAlias}_in_work_card, ${tAlias}.in_name as ${tAlias}_in_name, ${tAlias}.in_employee_id as ${tAlias}_in_employee_id, ${tAlias}.out_name as ${tAlias}_out_name, ${tAlias}.out_organization as ${tAlias}_out_organization, ${tAlias}.use_object as ${tAlias}_use_object, ${tAlias}.jurisdiction_setting as ${tAlias}_jurisdiction_setting, ${tAlias}.file_id as ${tAlias}_file_id, ${tAlias}.download_flag as ${tAlias}_download_flag, ${tAlias}.enabled_flag as ${tAlias}_enabled_flag, ${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by, ${tAlias}.approval_status as ${tAlias}_approval_status, ${tAlias}.oa_order as ${tAlias}_oa_order, ${tAlias}.last_verdict as ${tAlias}_last_verdict, ${tAlias}.approval_end_time as ${tAlias}_approval_end_time

select
,
from td_courseware tc join tool_local_storage tls on tc.file_id = tls.id
mapper.insert: insert into td_courseware (name, dependent_project, dependent_id, employee_type, in_work_card, in_name, in_employee_id, out_name, out_organization, use_object, jurisdiction_setting, file_id, download_flag, enabled_flag, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by,approval_status,oa_order,last_verdict,approval_end_time) values (#{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dependentProject,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dependentId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{employeeType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{inWorkCard,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{inName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{inEmployeeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{outName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{outOrganization,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{useObject,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{jurisdictionSetting,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{storage.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{downloadFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{approvalStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{oaOrder,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{lastVerdict,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{approvalEndTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})
mapper.update: update td_courseware set name = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, dependent_project = #{dependentProject,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, dependent_id = #{dependentId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, employee_type = #{employeeType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, in_work_card = #{inWorkCard,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, in_name = #{inName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, in_employee_id = #{inEmployeeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, out_name = #{outName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, out_organization = #{outOrganization,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, use_object = #{useObject,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, jurisdiction_setting = #{jurisdictionSetting,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, file_id = #{storage.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, download_flag = #{downloadFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, enabled_flag = #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
